replies.msg: six minutes older. She also has two younger siblings, sister Charlotte (born 1995) and brother William (born 1999).[144] She and her twin sister are named after Prince Andrew's daughters, Princess Eugenie and Princess Beatrice of York. Her sister Charlotte is named after Charlotte Casiraghi, the daughter of Monégasque Princess Caroline and her then husband Stefano Casiraghi,[145] and William is named after Prince William, Duke of Cambridge.[146
